Name: Nothing Was The Same (Deluxe)
Tracklist:
Drake said in an interview after NWTS released, that the original deluxe version was going to be the album's tracklist flipped/reversed. He said, "The deluxe edition was going to flip the whole track list, so it would go 'Pound Cake' then 'Too Much'—it would go in reverse. It was a cool, different listening experience. Name: Views
Tracklist:
Early tracklist for Views, seen in footage from 100gigs.org. The songs separated from the initial tracklist were the planned bonus tracks for the album, as said by Drake while working on the tracklist in the 100gigs.org footage, but Hotline Bling would end up being the sole bonus track from Views. Can I was likely scrapped from the album due to leaks. The writing above Hotline Bling is likely not a track, as 40 pointed out that there were "three bonuses" and not four. This version (according to 40 in the footage) is 1 hour and 11 minutes in length.
